title: serpocaulon polystichum
intro: Serpocaulon polystichum, also known as the Polystichum fern, is a type of vascular plant belonging to the Polypodiaceae family. It is a species of fern that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation. The plant contains various compounds, including flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which are believed to possess antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. Traditionally, Serpocaulon polystichum is prepared as a tea or infusion, and can also be used in herbal supplements or as a topical application for wound care.
